productDisplayName: John Miller Men Striped Purple Shirt
description: Composition White shirt with purple stripes made of a cotton/polyester blend fabric, has a spread collar, a patch pocket on the left chest, a full buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hem Fit Classic Wash care Machine/hand wash at 40 C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal Warm iron Designed for the ambitious executive, this striped formal shirt from the john miller collection is stitched to perfection. Pair it with crisp formal pants, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
